creator: jnlin@csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Hi,

Please commit, thanks!

On Thu, Jun 3, 2010 at 2:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of comms/p5-SMS-Send-TW-HiAir,
>
> Please note that PR ports/147355 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/147355
